productDisplayName: Timberland Men's Nautical Stripe Pique White T-shirt
description: CompositionWhite polo neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 100% organic cotton, with red and indigo blue stripes, softly ribbed collar and cuff, short buttoned placket, blue fabric tape on the inseam of the collar, brand logo appliqued on the left chest, embroidery  on right chest,vented hem, number seven and three appliqued on the right sleeveFittingRegularWash care Machine wash in cold water at 30 degree C Wash dark colours separately Wash inside out Do not bleach Tumble dry normal Do not iron on print or decoration Warm iron Do not dry clean Pledge your allegiance to your favorite brand by wearing this white striped polo neck tee from timberland. Displaying the year in which it was formally christened &ldquo timberland&rdquo ,  (1973), this t-shirt looks good when worn in the day as well as night. Pair it with jeans or cargos to get the look you always desired. This shirt has been manufactured in an environment-friendly manner, with the aim to reduce the Carbon FootprintModel statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
